content: Vite 8.x is the current major (Context7 shows v7.0.0, v8.0.0, v8.0.7, v8.0.10 as available versions; v8 is latest). Vite supports TypeScript out of the box with no extra config — add 'vite/client' to tsconfig compilerOptions.types. For vanilla TS browser apps, use the 'vanilla-ts' create-vite template. Build minification defaults to 'oxc' (Oxc Minifier, 30-90x faster than terser). Config uses satisfies UserConfig for type checking. For strict TypeScript, set 'strict: true' in tsconfig and pair with 'noEmit: true'. rollupOptions deprecated in Vite 7+; use build.rolldownOptions instead (Rolldown bundler).
